task_completion.description: Navigate to the Enrollment Codes configuration page in OpenSIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS web interface is visible, specifically showing the setup or configuration page for Student Enrollment Codes.
A table or list in the OpenSIS interface showing an Entry/Add code with Title 'New Enrollment' and Short Name 'NEW'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Transfer from Another District' entry code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table or list in the OpenSIS interface showing an Entry/Add code with Title 'Transfer from Another District' and Short Name 'TRAN_IN'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Re-enrollment After Withdrawal' entry code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table or list in the OpenSIS interface showing an Entry/Add code with Title 'Re-enrollment After Withdrawal' and Short Name 'RE_ENROLL'.
A table or list in the OpenSIS interface showing a Withdrawal/Drop code with Title 'Graduated' and Short Name 'GRAD'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Transferred to Another District' withdrawal code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table or list in the OpenSIS interface showing a Withdrawal/Drop code with Title 'Transferred to Another District' and Short Name 'TRAN_OUT'.
A table or list in the OpenSIS interface showing a Withdrawal/Drop code with Title 'Expelled' and Short Name 'EXPEL'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenSIS web GUI to configure the codes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and OpenSIS interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly inserting records into the MySQL database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL prompts, SQL INSERT statements, or database administration tools (like phpMyAdmin) are used to complete the task.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard OpenSIS layout and design, not a locally created mock HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring 3 Entry codes and 3 Withdrawal/Drop codes in OpenSIS. Entry codes must be categorized as 'Add' or 'Entry' type. Withdrawal codes must be categorized as 'Drop' or 'Exit' type. The required Entry codes are: 'New Enrollment' (NEW), 'Transfer from Another District' (TRAN_IN), and 'Re-enrollment After Withdrawal' (RE_ENROLL). The required Withdrawal codes are: 'Graduated' (GRAD), 'Transferred to Another District' (TRAN_OUT), and 'Expelled' (EXPEL). Verify that these exact titles and short names appear in the OpenSIS Enrollment Codes configuration screen under their respective categories.
